case_title: HUI, FERNANDO vs. MYRTHIL, ALIX et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT MYRTHIL, ALIX
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,

DEPT.#1, JUDGE HERBERT DONALDSON. C/C FOR CT. TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/ATTY. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIP W/JUDGMENT FOR PL.- REST. PREMISES AT 470-B 35TH AVE, S.F, CA. - WRIT ISSUES IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 8-31-93 - ALL RENTS WVD. - IF DEF VACATES LEAVING PREMISES UNDAMAGED, CLEAN & ALL PRESONAL PROPERTY REMOVED, PL. WILL PAY DEF. $500 IN EXCHANGE FOR KEYS. IF CONDITIONS MET, PL. WILL S/A JUDGMENT & DISM. PL. ATTY TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT MYRTHIL, ALIX ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MYRTHIL, ALIX THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 470-B 35TH AVE, S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL SEP-01-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE FILE FOR JUDGDMENT DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUI, FERNANDO AS TO DEFENDANT MYRTHIL, ALIX DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUI, FERNANDO COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUL-20-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
